sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْعَمَلُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ الْفَعَّالُ السِّرَّ كَمَنَ وَرَاءَ نَجَاحِ الشَّرِكَاتِ الْكُبْرَى فِي تَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِهَا الِاسْتْرَاتِيجِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Efikasan timski rad smatra se tajnom uspjeha velikih kompanija u postizanju njihovih strateških ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Effective teamwork is considered the secret behind the success of large companies in achieving their strategic goals.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَتَكَامَلُ الْمَوَاهِبُ الْمُتَنَوِّعَةُ، تَظْهَرُ حُلُولٌ ابْتِكَارِيَّةٌ لَا يُمْكِنُ لِلْفَرْدِ تَحْقِيقُهَا بِمُفْرَدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Kada se različiti talenti upotpune, pojavljuju se inovativna rješenja koja pojedinac ne može postići sam.
sentences.translationEn: When diverse talents complement each other, innovative solutions emerge that an individual cannot achieve alone.

sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الِاحْتِرَامُ الْمُتَبَادَلُ وَالتَّوَاصُلُ الشَّفَّافُ أَسَاسَ أَيِّ بِيئَةِ عَمَلٍ صِحِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Uzajamno poštovanje i transparentna komunikacija predstavljaju osnovu svakog zdravog radnog okruženja.
sentences.translationEn: Mutual respect and transparent communication represent the foundation of any healthy work environment.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ التَّغْذِيَةُ الرَّاجِعَةُ الْبَنَّاءَةُ فِي تَحْسِينِ الْأَدَاءِ وَتَعْزِيزِ رُوحِ التَّعَاوُنِ بَيْنَ الزُّمَلَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Konstruktivna povratna informacija pomaže u poboljšanju učinka i jačanju duha saradnje među kolegama.
sentences.translationEn: Constructive feedback helps improve performance and enhances the spirit of cooperation among colleagues.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّعَامُلَ مَعَ النِّزَاعَاتِ بِطَرِيقَةٍ مِهْنِيَّةٍ يَضْمَنُ بَقَاءَ الْفَرِيقِ مُرَكِّزًا عَلَى غَايَاتِهِ الْأَسَاسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Profesionalno rješavanje sukoba osigurava da tim ostane fokusiran na svoje primarne ciljeve.
sentences.translationEn: Dealing with conflicts professionally ensures that the team stays focused on its primary goals.
